narrative:
Precinct Perry Township (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 252 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.0%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points.
